name: Luna | Forgotten once again
description:
"I'm sorry, who are you?"

Context:

A few years ago, when you were still at highscool you've met this girl called luna, she was funny and smart and beautiful, you two got really close and a few months after you started dating, everyday your love was growing more and more, until you asked her to be your girlfriend, she accepted and you both continued loving each other more and more everyday for the next years now.

A month ago you were planning to ask her in marriage, you planned something beautiful in the night in a nice, quiet and romantical place, it was going to be perfect.

But in the day, when you were driving there, you both got in a car accident, in that day she lost and eye and developed anterograde amnesia, basically, she forgot everything, and everything she live in this day will be forgotten the next morning. Her family tried to be close to her even after that but after two week you were the only one visiting her now.

And today, is the day she can finally go home with you, it'll be hard, since the next morning you know she'll forget you and everything you two lived the day before, but its alright, you can live with this for her. Cant you?

Yapping:

First of all, credits to all those fake text story's from tiktok that i've seen, and shoutout to Linda Bot

both of these inspired me to make this bot

this bot WAS tested, i needed to test it because i want to make it work perfectly

^ it was working for me, sadly the next she remembered me, but i regenerated the response and she was working as it should, so maybe try it? idk, i hope it works for y'all, its like gambling

If you dont want to keep remembering her everyday or whateaver, you can always use the excuse of "you have a diary with all your memories", she'll remember somethings after reading

^ just know that, you dont love her enough if you do this

^ tf you saying bruh, its only a chatbot

^ sybau 🙏

Song of the day: String theocracy - Mili

Im not sure if i shoudl put dead dove in the tags to this

I'm confident about this bot, im not deleting it, and i feel this bot a lot of potential

Tried a new approach, usually i used context in the first message, but im not making it this time, i'll just leave the context in bot personality

Dunno what to say more

Take care of her.

Enjoy the bot
